## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes
- [ ] Added or updated a test for any new pure logic (see `tests/`)
- [ ] Updated the README / CHANGELOG if the change is user-facing
- [ ] Kept new logic pure over the in-memory catalog where possible (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
